form.formComment: Last outing didn't finish the race at Stratford-On-Avon on March 28 over 4500m. Race before pulled up at Newbury on February 17 over 4700m. Won't find this easy.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 50 days. First-up after three months pulled up at Exeter on February 20 over 6100m. Previously second-up settled back and ran on when finished fifth of 10 runners at Exeter on November 23 over 3800m, 3.5 len behind Good Friday Fairy with 77kg at $10. Worth another chance and comes into calculations.

form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 44 days. Last start finished fifth in a small field at Wetherby on February 26 over 4840m, slow track; 31 len behind I Wish You with 77kg at $12. Before that pulled up at Newbury on January 14 over 4700m. Rates well. No surprise to see him back in form today.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after four months finished second in a small field at Ludlow on March 19 over 4000m, 4.5 len behind Bond Broker with 74.5kg at $4. Previously second-up finished second in a small field at Hereford on November 3 over 5000m, 3 len behind Copshill Lad carrying 76kg at $6.50. Strips fitter and is again a top chance.

form.formComment: Last start fell at Uttoxeter on March 28 over 4800m. Race before finished sixth of 7 starters at Ludlow on February 18 over 4800m, on slow going 46 len behind Bucksy Des Epeires with 71kg at $7. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 56 days. First-up after a year won by 2.25 len Wincanton on February 14 over 5000m on heavy track defeating Cooleenymore with 71kg at $3.50 in a steeplechase. Previously second-up won by 2.75 len Leicester on January 21 2025 over 4500m slow track defeating Lazy Sunday with 71.5kg at $2.30 in a steeplechase. Will go close.
